title: Single Fitted Sheet - Plain Dyed Poly Cotton 25cm Deep Fitted Sheets Single Bed Non Iron Easy Care 200 Thread Count Hypoallergenic & Fade Resistant Bed Sheet (Red, 90 x 190 cm)
features: SINGLE BED FITTED SHEET - Designed specifically for standard single beds, this fitted sheet, measuring 90 x 190 cm, features deep pockets to ensure a snug fit on mattresses up to 25 cm thick, providing a smooth and comfortable surface for a restful night's sleep.

NATURALLY BREATHABLE POLY COTTON FITTED SHEETS: Experience the comfort of premium polycotton with this deep fitted sheet, designed to be lightweight and breathable. Its moisture-wicking properties keep you cool and dry, inviting restful sleep. Perfect for warm sleepers and all-year-round serenity.

HOTEL-QUALITY SOFTNESS - Elevate your daily routine with our 200 thread count cotton, designed to provide a silky-smooth texture and hotel-quality softness. Our mattress cover and bed sheets luxurious fabric that not only enhances your comfort but is also engineered for durability, ensuring it maintains its quality through countless washes. Enjoy the perfect combination of elegance and resilience in your everyday life.

NATURALLY HYPOALLERGENIC AND ANTI-WRINKLE FABRIC - Our fitted bed sheet is designed with hypoallergenic and anti-wrinkle properties, making it an ideal choice for individuals with sensitive skin and allergy concerns. It promotes cleaner and healthier sleep by providing a gentle, irritation-free bedding experience.

SHRNK AND FADE RESISTANT – EASY TO MAINTAIN Crafted for long-term use, this bedsheet effectively resists shrinkage, fading, and pilling. Its machine-washable nature simplifies maintenance, making it a practical option for busy households that value low-maintenance bedding solutions.

Crafted from premium poly-cotton, these sheets offer a luxurious feel and exceptional durability. Available in various sizes, and 200 thread count for ultimate softness and breathability.
